## Summary
- What does this PR change?
- Why is it needed?

## Testing
- [ ] `uv run ruff check`
- [ ] `uv run pytest tests/unit -q`
- [ ] `uv run pytest -q`
- Notes on any skipped/failed tests:

## Checklist
- [ ] Docs updated (README/onboarding/demo script) if behavior changed
- [ ] Added/updated tests
- [ ] Linked issue or documented motivation
- [ ] No secrets/api keys committed

## Screenshots / Demo Output (optional)
Attach CLI output, Swagger screenshots, or other evidence that the change works.
